mapper.sql: cr.id, cr.record_code, cr.check_name, cr.check_date, cr.check_type, cr.template_id, ct.template_name, cr.rating_template_id, rt.template_name as rating_template_name, cr.status, cr.total_classes, cr.total_items, cr.total_deduct, cr.drafted_at, cr.submitted_at, cr.reviewed_at, cr.published_at, cr.archived_at, cr.remarks, cr.created_by, u.real_name as creator_name, cr.created_at, cr.updated_at

FROM check_records cr LEFT JOIN check_templates ct ON cr.template_id = ct.id AND ct.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN rating_templates rt ON cr.rating_template_id = rt.id AND rt.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users u ON cr.created_by = u.id AND u.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY cr.check_date DESC, cr.created_at DESC

SELECT cr.*, ct.template_name, ct.template_code, rt.template_name as rating_template_name, rt.template_code as rating_template_code, u.real_name as creator_name, u2.real_name as submitter_name, u3.real_name as reviewer_name, u4.real_name as publisher_name FROM check_records cr LEFT JOIN check_templates ct ON cr.template_id = ct.id AND ct.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN rating_templates rt ON cr.rating_template_id = rt.id AND rt.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users u ON cr.created_by = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users u2 ON cr.submitted_by = u2.id AND u2.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users u3 ON cr.reviewed_by = u3.id AND u3.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users u4 ON cr.published_by = u4.id AND u4.deleted = 0 WHERE cr.deleted = 0 AND cr.id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ccs.class_id) as total_classes, COUNT(DISTINCT cri.id) as total_items, COALESCE(SUM(ccs.total_deduct), 0) as total_original_deduct, COALESCE(SUM(ccs.weighted_deduct), 0) as total_weighted_deduct, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cri.appeal_status = 1 THEN cri.id END) as pending_appeals, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cri.appeal_status = 2 THEN cri.id END) as approved_appeals, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cri.appeal_status = 3 THEN cri.id END) as rejected_appeals, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cri.is_temporary = 1 THEN cri.id END) as temporary_items FROM check_records cr LEFT JOIN check_record_class_stats ccs ON cr.id = ccs.record_id AND ccs.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN check_record_items cri ON cr.id = cri.record_id AND cri.deleted = 0 WHERE cr.deleted = 0 AND cr.id = #{recordId}

SELECT ccs.id, ccs.record_id, ccs.class_id, c.class_name, c.grade_level, ccs.total_deduct, ccs.weighted_deduct, ccs.final_score, ccs.class_rank, ccs.grade_rank, ccs.class_size, ccs.deduct_item_count, ccs.rating_code, ccs.rating_name, d.dept_name as department_name FROM check_record_class_stats ccs LEFT JOIN classes c ON ccs.class_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE ccs.deleted = 0 AND ccs.record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY ccs.final_score DESC, ccs.weighted_deduct ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_records WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_records WHERE rating_template_id = #{ratingTemplateId} AND deleted = 0
